column1: # Table 1. Information about the populations and samples of Physaria globosa included in the study, including voucher number, collection locality, ecoregion, GPS coordinates, and number of samples collected per site.

# Column definitions: Population code=population identifier used in the study; Collector=voucher or collector information; Species name=taxon name for the sampled population; State, County, Locality (Element Occurrence number)=collection locality description; Ecoregion=ecoregion or management category; Lat=latitude in decimal degrees; Long=longitude in decimal degrees; Number of samples=number of sampled individuals included from the site
# Note: * Samples collected as part of a previous study on Physaria filiformis (Edwards et al. 2021).
